About Me

Who I Am

I grew up in Bengaluru and moved to Dubai at ten years old. Living across two very different cities has shaped how I see people, problems and opportunities. I am someone who genuinely enjoys working with others. I like understanding what makes people tick and I find collaboration naturally easy.

In school my favourite subjects were economics and marketing, which is probably why business analytics felt like such a natural fit. I find it fascinating how numbers can tell a story that actually changes decisions. That connection between data and real-world outcomes is what drew me to this field.

Outside of academics I enjoy cooking, following fashion and learning about game development. I care deeply about social causes and try to be an active advocate wherever I can.
